titleStmt.title: SII 31.158: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 158. (A.R. No. B 281 of 1936.) VIPANAGANḌLA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the well called Bommanabhāvi.
This is dated Śaka 1632 (wrong for 1623), Vṛisha, Mārgaśira, ba. 10, Friday, corresponding to December 13, 1701 A.D. f.d.t. °78 (Saturday).

Registers a gift of garden (tōṁta) as Īnām to Bommireḍḍi, the grandson of Āvula Bommi reḍḍi for digging the common drinking water well (dharma gōḍi bhāvi) in the village Viṁpinagaṁdla situated in Kandan Vōlisīṁā. The Kandanavōlu is stated to have been given as mokhāsa by Abdula Wahābu Sāheb to Musākhān while mahārājādhirāja Sultān Pādusha was ruiling over from Vijayāpura (Bījāpūr).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbbula 1632 Agunanēṭi
vriṣunāma saṁvvatsara mā¨rgasira ba 10 śu . śrīmas
nmahamaharājādhirājula yina sultānupāda
śāhulayyavāru vijayāpurapaṭṭaṇa
maṁddu mū¨rdhābhiṣiktulayina rājyaparipālanaṁ śāya
ṁgānu kaṁddanavōlistaḷamaṁddu Abdulavahābu sā
hēbulayyavāru kaṁddanavōlilōki cēllēsīmalōnu viṁpasa
gaṁḍlagrāmaṁnu musakhānunivāriki mōkhāsa pāliṁccivuṁḍriganu
ka Āgrāmaṁlōnu Āvulaboṁmmireḍḍi pautṛḍaina bhū
mireḍḍi putṛuṁḍaina boṁmmireḍḍi kaṭṭeṁcinatha¨rmma
gāḍibhāvi yibhāvikaṭṭeṁccinaṁduku divā
ṇaṁ saṁttōṣiṁcci pāliṁcci yiccina yinā
mati tōṁṭa bāviki tū¨rpuna ¬1 ... tōṁṭṭa yiccināru
. śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 31.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
